title: Reusable Form Components
subtitle: Array methods, composition, children, lists, and keys for a shared input library
prerequisites: day02 — useState and controlled form inputs
day02 — TypeScript interfaces for props and form data
day02 — login page with email, password, validation, and error states
expectedOutcome: Use map, filter, and reduce to transform and render lists in React
Extract Day 02 login inputs into reusable TextInput, PasswordInput, Checkbox, Button, and Error components
Compose UI with the children prop without duplicating markup
Assign stable keys when rendering lists and explain why in interviews
Debug missing keys, wrong list rendering, and duplicate component logic
definitionOfDone: Reusable input library components live in src/components/ui/ or similar
Day 02 login page refactored to use the library — behavior unchanged
Field list or error list rendered with map() and correct keys
No duplicate input markup across components

tomorrowPreview.title: GitHub User Search
tomorrowPreview.summary: Tomorrow you will learn useEffect, async fetch, and loading/error/empty states by building a GitHub user search that calls a real API.
